summary: Backend testing for Refirm R Series implant system completed successfully. All 20 tests passed. Verified: (1) Refirm R Series in implant library with 31 variants and 6 diameters (3.2, 3.5, 4.0, 4.5, 5.0, 5.5mm), (2) Refirm R Series in available drilling protocols, (3) All bone-density-specific drilling protocols (D1-D4) for multiple diameters, (4) Special Ø5.5 case with mandatory CSK for D1/D2, (5) RPM values correct for each drill type, (6) Insertion torque 35-45 Ncm verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Refirm R Series protocol implementation correctly handles all 6 diameters with bone-density-specific logic
Special Ø5.5 case properly implements mandatory CSK Ø5.3 for D1/D2 bone densities
RPM values correctly differentiated: Lance/Cylindrical 1200-1500, Taper 800-1000, CSK 600-800, Implant 20-30
Protocol labels correctly describe bone density handling (Dense Bone, Moderately Dense, Soft Bone, Very Soft Bone)
seed_data_creation: None - Refirm R Series seeded from implant_library_latest.xlsx on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refirm R Series drilling protocol fully tested. Key rules verified: (1) All drills go to implant length, CSK always 4-5mm crestal only, (2) D1=full sequence, D2=replace last drill with CSK, D3=drop last drill, D4=drop 2 drills, (3) Ø5.5 special case: D1/D2 both get mandatory CSK Ø5.3, D3 gets full drills without CSK, D4 drops 1 drill.
verified_features: Backend: GET /api/implant-library/systems returns Refirm R Series with 31 variants, 6 diameters - VERIFIED
Backend: GET /api/drilling-protocols/available includes Refirm R Series - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø3.2×11.5mm D1 returns 4 steps (Lance 2.0, Cylindrical 2.5, Taper 2.9, Implant Placement) - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø3.2×11.5mm D2 returns 4 steps (Lance 2.0, Cylindrical 2.5, CSK 3.2, Implant Placement) - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø3.2×11.5mm D3 returns 3 steps (Lance 2.0, Cylindrical 2.5, Implant Placement) - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø3.2×11.5mm D4 returns 2 steps (Lance 2.0, Implant Placement) - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø4.0×11.5mm D1 returns 6 steps (2.0, 2.5, 2.9, 3.4, 3.9, Implant) - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø4.0×11.5mm D2 returns 6 steps (2.0, 2.5, 2.9, 3.4, CSK 3.7, Implant) - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø5.0×13mm D1 returns 8 steps (2.0, 2.5, 2.9, 3.4, 3.9, 4.4, 4.9, Implant) - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø5.0×13mm D4 returns 6 steps (2.0, 2.5, 2.9, 3.4, 3.9, Implant) - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø5.5×11.5mm D1 returns 9 steps with MANDATORY CSK Ø5.3 - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø5.5×11.5mm D2 returns 9 steps same as D1 - MANDATORY CSK - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø5.5×11.5mm D3 returns 8 steps (no CSK) - VERIFIED
Backend: POST /api/drilling-protocols/generate for Refirm R Series Ø5.5×11.5mm D4 returns 7 steps - VERIFIED
Backend: RPM values - Lance/Cylindrical drills use 1200-1500, Taper drills use 800-1000, CSK uses 600-800, Implant uses 20-30 - VERIFIED
Backend: Insertion torque is 35-45 Ncm for Refirm - VERIFIED
Backend: Protocol_type labels are correct for each bone density - VERIFIED
